summary: Completed comprehensive testing of auth modal, hero carousel animations, and AI tools. Auth modal works correctly with backdrop click-to-close and X button. Hero carousel has smooth animated transitions. Backend APIs all pass (16/16 tests). Main issue: Only 2/5 AI tools accessible in dashboard sidebar by default.

integration_issues.issue: Only 2 out of 5 AI tools (brandkit, social) are accessible in sidebar. Missing: musicbio, syncpitch, bizpitch. This is because backend only assigns ['brandkit', 'social'] as default apps on registration (server.py line 158).

action_items: Update backend server.py line 158 to include all 5 AI tools in default apps: ['brandkit', 'musicbio', 'social', 'syncpitch', 'bizpitch']
critical_code_review_comments: Backend only assigns 2 apps (brandkit, social) on registration instead of all 5 AI tools as required

success_rate.frontend: 90% - Auth modal and hero carousel work correctly, but only 2/5 AI tools accessible

seed_data_creation: Test users created during pytest execution
context_for_next_testing_agent: Auth modal fully tested - opens over landing page with faded background, closes on backdrop click and X button, has Sign In and Create Account tabs. Hero carousel has smooth animated transitions with staggered entrance. All backend APIs working. Main fix needed: Update default apps in registration to include all 5 AI tools.
tests_passed: Auth modal opens over landing page with faded background visible
Auth modal closes when clicking outside (on backdrop)
Auth modal closes when clicking the X button
Auth modal has Sign In and Create Account tabs
Hero carousel has smooth slide transitions with animated entrance
Brand Kit AI tool panel loads with input fields and Generate button
Social AI tool panel loads with input fields
All 16 backend API tests passed (health, auth, profile, notifications, activities, AI generation)
tests_failed: All 5 AI tools accessible from dashboard sidebar - Only 2/5 accessible (brandkit, social). Missing: musicbio, syncpitch, bizpitch
rca_of_the_issue: Root cause: In /app/backend/server.py line 158, the registration endpoint only assigns ['brandkit', 'social'] as default apps. To fix: Change line 158 to 'apps': ['brandkit', 'musicbio', 'social', 'syncpitch', 'bizpitch']
